title: Test gap: no tests for activitypub.rs endpoints (profile_page, post_page, ap_context_collection, outbox)
description:
activitypub.rs has zero #[test] functions. The following endpoints have no test coverage:

- profile_page: would immediately reveal the PostRow/context_url runtime error (smallhold-haf0.2)
- post_page: same FromRow error, returns 500
- ap_context_collection: the FEP-f228 context collection endpoint has no tests verifying correct output shape, multi-post conversations, or the visibility filter
- outbox: no test verifying context_url is included in the Note objects

Additionally, parse_collection_sync_header has no test for digest values with base64 padding (trailing '=' or '=='), which is the most common real-world case.
